item.title: Investigated elevated errors and slower responses on claude.ai
item.description: [none] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: AI Organizations Can Be More Effective but Less Aligned than Individual Agents
item.description: We study AI organizations, teams of AI agents working together toward a common goal, and find that they produce solutions that are more effective but less aligned than those from individual agents.
